creator: equal.year6403@fastmail.com
text: Hello, I have the RedMiBook Pro 15" (2024 / Ryzen 7840HS) and can confirm the built-in keyboard's malfunctioning in the same *manner* as described on OpenBSD. It has a sticky delay where character(s) print if the same key is pressed many times. Have observed this behavior on 14 and 15 main branch (as of early June 2024). External USB keyboard does function correctly.
